title: alisma polyspermum
intro: Alisma polyspermum, also known as water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Alismataceae family, commonly found in freshwater environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alisma polyspermum include relief from edema, hypertension, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve kidney function. Alisma polyspermum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also dried and used as a powder in various supplements.
